name: Happy Cat
description: Happy Cat is a fun physics-based puzzle game where creativity solves every challenge. Draw shapes and objects to interact with the environment and help guide the playful cat to its goal. Each level offers unique puzzles that require smart thinking, timing, and experimentation. Use gravity and clever designs to complete stages in multiple ways. Simple controls, relaxing gameplay, and creative freedom make every level satisfying and engaging.
instructions: Draw on the screen to create objects Use drawings to interact with the environment Guide the cat by solving each puzzle
